tasks.name: Write M33 plan doc — Copilot Service
tasks.scope: Author docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md using M32 plan doc as structural template. 11 tasks (T0–T10), 11 invariants preserved, ABI rebuild dance documented in T10, commit cadence locked. 292 lines.

tasks.name: Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo
tasks.scope: Migration 0011 (table + composite index, FK CASCADE, CHECK on category + severity per Phase 5 §8.4) + Drizzle schema + CopilotInsightsRepo (6 methods: create / getById / listActive / dismiss / expireStale / upsertWithDedup) + 15 unit tests. Dedup contract locked: category-scoped → numeric-drift guard → Jaccard bigram > 0.8 (cheap rejections first). Same commit flipped Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row 📋 → 🚧 In progress — 2 of 11 tasks shipped (2026-04-16).

tasks.name: system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card
tasks.scope: Second is_system=1 row per company alongside M31's system-agent. NEW role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md (117 lines, level: system, tools_allowed: M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied locks out decompose_project / delegate_subtask / review_deliverable / shell / filesystem / network / send_message_to_colleague). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts exports SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple + isSystemRoleId() predicate. system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal (legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases). seed.ts seeds system-copilot inline after system-agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep auto-covered by is_system=1 + level='system' — no regression risk in role-loader / listVisibleByCompany / agentic-tools-write scorer.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T2 — system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card

tasks.name: Rolling event window + bus subscription
tasks.scope: NEW services/copilot-event-window.ts (169 LOC) + services/copilot-event-window.test.ts (195 LOC, 8 tests) + main/index.ts wiring (+39 lines). CopilotEventWindow factory returning { start, stop, snapshot, clear }. MAX_EVENTS_PER_COMPANY=100 private const (NOT a user setting in M33). EXCLUDED_EVENT_TYPES = {'token.delta'} — filtered at push + hydration. start/stop wraps deps.bus.subscribe (rag-indexer pattern). snapshot returns spread defensive copy; warm-start hydrates from eventsRepo.listByCompany on first call per company; hydrated: Set<string> flag prevents re-hydration. clear(companyId) removes deque + hydrated flag. parseRow(EventRow)→DashboardEvent helper duplicated from orchestrator/event-bus.ts (module-private there); documented duplication-with-intent. Composition root: instantiated after ragIndexer.start() with same bus+eventsRepo deps; will-quit shutdown stops after rag indexer. clear(companyId) NOT wired to companies.archive — that IPC does not exist in the codebase today (companies repo has create/getById/getBySlug/list/setStatus only); wiring deferred to the milestone that adds companies.archive (T3 follow-up).
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T3 — rolling event window + bus subscription

tasks.name: CopilotAnalyzerService — periodic scheduler + LLM + dedup + expiry
tasks.scope: Headline M33 task. CopilotAnalyzerService (start/stop/stopAll/tick/getLastAnalysisAt/restart) with buildAnalysisPrompt (deterministic ≤2000 event-summary chars), Zod InsightDraftSchema + one-shot nudge retry + malformed_output skip, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper (actor: system-copilot), dedup via upsertWithDedup.merged flag (copilot.insight emits only on insert), per-cycle expiry sweep (listStale then per-row copilot.expired then expireStale), runs-table row per tick with kind='copilot'. Separate CopilotEventTrigger file with 30s-debounced per-company triggerAnalysis for meeting.ended / ticket.closed / goal.progressChanged / agentic.failed+budget_exhausted (debounce not throttle — timer resets on new signal, latest-reason wins). Migration 0012 ADDS runs.kind column (no CHECK, TS union enforces) with default 'work' backfill. +3 EventType literals + CopilotCategory / CopilotSeverity / CopilotAnalyzedReason unions. listStale added to CopilotInsightsRepo as non-mutating sibling (preserves T1 expireStale count-return). Composition root instantiates analyzer+trigger after agenticLoopServiceInstance; shutdown via analyzer.stopAll() + trigger.stop() alongside rag/copilotEventWindow.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T4 — copilot analyzer service + pause-aware scheduler

tasks.name: copilot.* IPC surface + preload bridge
tasks.scope: Four IPC channels per Phase 5 §8.6 (copilot.insights / copilot.dismiss / copilot.ask / copilot.configure) typed end-to-end via TeamXApi + IpcContract. NEW ipc/copilot-handlers.ts buildCopilotHandlers factory mirroring rag-handlers.ts. NEW shared-types/src/copilot.ts with JSON-safe CopilotInsight wire type + 4 IPC arg/result pairs + CopilotDismissedPayload. `copilot.dismissed` appended to EventType union. window.teamx.copilot namespace on preload bridge. REQUEST_CHANNELS extended with the 4 copilot channels + command.getRunSnapshot backfill (was missing from shutdown strip list). Composition root wires analyzer + insightsRepo + bus + isTestMode; copilot.ask throws 'not implemented' pending T6 agenticLoopStart wire-in; copilot.configure throws outside test mode directing to settings.setCopilot (T7). Tests +8 exact (2 per channel). 0 lint errors, 24 warnings, typecheck clean.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T5 — copilot.* IPC surface + preload bridge

tasks.name: copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool
tasks.scope: Replaced T5 copilot.ask stub with full round-trip through AgenticLoopService.start using employeeId=system-copilot. NEW agentic-tools-copilot.ts — query_copilot_insights Tool factory (zod-strict, {rows, truncated} envelope, 50-row cap, JSON-safe CopilotInsightProjection distinct from Drizzle CopilotInsightRow, includeDismissed flag threaded through ListActiveFilter). NEW buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, deps) level-gated composer — returns [query_copilot_insights] when employee.roleId === SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID; empty array otherwise. NEW copilot-service.ts CopilotService front-door wrapping AgenticLoopService.start; resolves per-company system-copilot via employeesRepo.findSystemByRoleId + passes id through as employeeId. Returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 IpcExecuteResult.complex_request shape for M34 sidebar wire-contract stability. EDIT test-agentic-tools.ts — extend three-tier canned seam with __ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY__:<json> sentinel + CANNED_COPILOT_QUERY_TABLE (empty) + FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY fallback; TestEmployeeContext gains optional roleId; createTestToolsForEmployee swaps write-side for copilot tool set when roleId === 'system-copilot'. EDIT copilot-insights.ts — ListActiveFilter.includeDismissed optional flag; when true, listActive drops isNull(dismissedAt) predicate while keeping TTL filter. EDIT copilot-handlers.test.ts — flipped T5 'throws when stub in effect' to 'rejects empty companyId/text before dispatch' since comp root always wires agenticLoopStart now. EDIT main/index.ts — composition root wires agenticLoopStart via copilot-service; buildTools callback resolves roleId via employeesRepo.getById once per run and branches to [...readSide, ...buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, deps)] for system-copilot — system-agent path (M31 read-only + M32 write-side) unchanged.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T6 — copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool

tasks.name: Copilot settings + UI
tasks.scope: Three clamped settings keys: copilot_enabled (bool, default true), copilot_interval_minutes (1-60, default 5), copilot_categories (subset of 5 categories, default all). settings.getCopilot / setCopilot IPC. CopilotSection UI under Settings → Runtime (alongside agentic + planner). setCopilot triggers copilotAnalyzerService.restart(companyId). Unit tests +7.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T7 — copilot settings + UI

tasks.name: Canned copilot provider seam
tasks.scope: Three-tier canned seam (mirror M30 test-classifier / M31 test-agentic-provider / M32 test-agentic-tools). __ECHO_COPILOT__:<json> sentinel → canned per-prompt table → fallback. Extend test-agentic-provider with system-copilot-actor entries for T9 E2E. NODE_ENV=test swaps provider. Unit tests +5.

tasks.name: copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip
tasks.scope: Full round-trip against canned provider. Seed events → copilot.tick (test-only IPC) → assert insight persisted → dismiss → assert dismissed_at + audit row → copilot.ask → assert grounded answer on system-copilot thread → assert destructive gate ABSENT → assert two system threads distinguishable. Subagent pass for canned-script generation. +1 E2E spec file.

notes: M33 T3 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit c6b40ae). +8 unit tests (1052 → 1060, exact match to T3 target). NEW services/copilot-event-window.ts with { start, stop, snapshot, clear } API. Bounded deque (100 events, private const), FIFO eviction, warm-start hydration from eventsRepo.listByCompany + hydrated Set flag for re-hydration guard. token.delta filtered at boundary (streaming noise). Defensive-copy on snapshot. Composition root wired after ragIndexer. clear(companyId) NOT wired to companies.archive — IPC doesn't exist today; deferred to milestone that adds it (T3 FOLLOW-UP). 3 files (+403 / -0), 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean.

T3 FOLLOW-UP: Wire CopilotEventWindow.clear(companyId) into companies.archive once that IPC is added (M34+ scope). Current state: public clear() method exists + tested, production path never calls it because no archive path exists. Zero-surface-area until the archive IPC lands — documented in copilot-event-window.ts §5 design notes.

M33 T2 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 4ce9d3e). +4 unit tests (1048 → 1052, exact match to T2 target). NEW system-copilot role card (117-line role.md). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts — SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple + isSystemRoleId() predicate (future-proofing; is_system column stays authoritative runtime filter). system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal — legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases so M31 callers don't break. seed.ts seeds copilot inline after agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep AUTO-COVERED — no employees.list / orgchart.get / hire-picker / delegation-picker / meeting-attendee code changes because is_system=1 + level='system' already gates every surface. 6 files (+563/-62), 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean.

M33 T1 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 0a77d87). +15 unit tests (1033 → 1048, exact match to plan target). Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo + Drizzle schema additions. Dedup contract: category-scoped → numeric-drift guard → Jaccard bigram > 0.8. Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row flipped 📋 → 🚧 In progress — 2 of 11 tasks shipped (2026-04-16) (same commit). 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean.

M33 T0 SHIPPED (2026-04-16T08:15Z, commit c5cdeee). Plan doc materializes T1–T10 with per-task scope + commit templates + test deltas. Totals: +~48 unit tests across T1–T8 (targets +~25 net — aligns with design §9 M33 estimate after accounting for incidental tests not counted in per-task deltas).

T4 is head-of-queue (CopilotAnalyzerService — headline task, biggest of M33). Full session, subagent candidate for prompt-builder scaffolding. T4 consumes both T1's CopilotInsightsRepo (dedup/expire/upsert) AND T3's CopilotEventWindow (snapshot for prompt building) AND T2's system-copilot identity (actor for pause-aware providerRouter.complete). Migration 0012 extends runs.kind enum with 'copilot'. T5 is boilerplate (~30 min). T6 depends on T5 + T2. T7 is fast (~25 min). T8 prerequisite for T9. T9 is full session with one subagent pass. T10 is gate-only + docs (~60 min) — ABI dance mandatory.

Architectural seams active: three-tier canned test seam, {rows, truncated} envelope, data-step-kind stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, atomic + ledger commits, bus-event + audit-row invariant (#11), is_system + filter-sweep pattern with new isSystemRoleId predicate (M33 T2 extracts this).
Blocker for M34: copilot.ask must return { runId, threadId } matching M31 command.execute complex_request shape so M34 sidebar attaches step-stream with no second wire format. Verify in T6.

ABI rebuild dance (verified across M31 + M32 T10 + re-verified at M33 T1 vitest): Node ABI `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` (+ keytar), Electron ABI `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar` (comma-separated only — repeated -w flags crash @electron/rebuild@3.7.2).
